Event: The Arcane Adventure
Event Date: 14/05/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: E81
Connecting Thread

Enhancement: 1
Every 7 sec., the fighter applies a shield to themselves that blocks 20% / 21% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% of physical damage. The shield lasts for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 2
11000 Armor from the gems
Every 7 s, the fighter applies a shield to themselves and the allied fighter with the lowest current health, which blocks 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% of any damage. The shield lasts for 4 s. While the shield is active, when the shield blocks damage, the attacking enemy fighter is stunned for 2 s. The effect occurs no more than once every 1 s.

Enhancement: 3
22000 Armor from the gems
Every 7 sec, the fighter applies a shield to themselves and 2 allied fighters with the Lowest current health, which blocks 40% / 41% / 42% / 43% / 45% / 47% / 50% of any damage. The shield lasts for 5 sec. While the shield is active, when it blocks damage, the attacking enemy fighter turns to stone for 3 sec and receives 56400 / 80600 / 115200 / 153600 / 192000 / 240000 / 300000 physical damage. The enemy fighter turned to stone cannot move and takes 25% / 26% / 27% / 28% / 30% / 32% / 35% more damage. The effect triggers no more often than once every 1 sec.
